title: Market Settlement Record
description: Settlement outcome for a single market. Links the market ticker to the settled value and the authoritative data source used for resolution. Used by client.settlement(market_ticker).

result.description: Settlement result: 'yes' or 'no'. Null = not yet settled.

settlement_value_f.description: The actual observed value (°F) used for settlement.

settled_at.description: UTC timestamp when settlement was recorded (RFC3339).

cli_product_id.description: NWS CLI product identifier used for settlement (from specs/climate.json).

$comment: STUB: client.settlement() raises NotImplementedError until Sprint 3. Schema provided for forward compatibility.
